title: notopleura tolimensis
intro: Notopleura tolimensis, also known as Notopleura tolimensis, is a plant species belonging to the Rubiaceae family. It is a woody vine native to the tropical regions of South America and is traditionally used in folk medicine. The medicinal properties of Notopleura tolimensis include anti-inflammatory, antimalarial, and antioxidant activities. Notopleura tolimensis is used to treat various health conditions, including malaria, fever, and digestive issues, and its herbal preparations include tea infusions, extracts, and tinctures.
